Announcements

Announcements

The ALAT English Preparatory Academic Placement Exam

03
						December

2025

Dear students,

The English Preparatory Academic Placement Exam will be held online via the O’Learn platform on Thursday, December 4. You are required to complete the necessary technical preparations on the O’Learn platform before the exam. Detailed information regarding platform access will be shared on O’Learn prior to the exam. Students who wish to apply for the exam can simply send their request to

aleyna.acikalin@okan.edu.tr

.Those who score 70 or above in this exam will be eligible to take the face-to-face OPAE Proficiency Exam on Frıday, December 5.

We wish you success.

en

tr
